opportunities.title: [Hiring]🎬 Looking for a Short-Form Video Editor (Paid + Long-Term)
opportunities.description:
[Hiring]🎬 Looking for a Short-Form Video Editor (Paid + Long-Term)

Looking for an editor who can create a 15–20 sec high-retention YouTube Shorts edit in this style: https://youtube.com/shorts/EeqnQAfqZE0 I'll provide the stream footage and VO assets. The edit should be fast-paced , use minimal voiceover , rely mostly on the original clips/audio, and match the pacing and quality of the reference. If interested, DM me with your rates and I'll send the project details. 🚀   submitted by   /u/Commercial_Piano_925 [link]   [comments]

opportunities.title: Driver
opportunities.description:
We are looking for new employees who can or are willing to learn how to drive 3 tonne trucks.

We are looking for experienced Truck Jockeys to join our team in Melbourne.

We are currently looking for experienced cleaners to join our Melbourne cleaning staff.

Please mention the word **WINNERS** and tag RMTcyLjIxNC4xNTUuMTE2 when applying to show you read the job post completely (#RMTcyLjIxNC4xNTUuMTE2). This is a beta feature to avoid spam applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this and see they're human.
